title: 11 world drops away
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Preserve Tina, product, and the intact dark rear seat, but create a clean hero wide shot. Tina and the car remain at exactly their original street height while the entire neighborhood sinks gently downward beneath them like a vast stage elevator. Rooftops, roads, trees, and cars recede toward a cloud layer below as open blue sky appears around Tina. She seems airborne only because the world has moved. Serene and exhilarating, no parachute, flying-car machinery, wreckage, or floating candy islands.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one cinematic advertising styleframe, never a collage or storyboard grid. Image 1 and Image 2 establish Tina as the same bookish eighteen-year-old young woman with long brown hair, blue jacket, black top, pink lychee gummy, and pink Peelerz pouch. Preserve her identity and the product, but obey each prompt's new composition and creative situation. Every job is an independent idea after Tina eats the candy; it does not need to preserve the car-peel, parachute, tropical, miniature, or gummy-fish ideas from other rounds. Make the single situation immediately legible, benign, youthful, visually bold, and plausible as a polished commercial styleframe. No captions, borders, split screens, watermarks, random candyland, or added package copy.
